content.body: Do we still record meetings and publishe them somewhere?
yes and no... there is a large backlog of unpublished recordings. sorry about that. is there something specific you are looking for?
The one from February 25th, if you could send it by email to me
Got the Zoom sent to both of you.
The current publishing process requires both kris and chris to have an idle moment for drudgery, which isn’t great.
we could probably streamline this, but this also required additional idleness, and concurrent idleness at that!
but maybe we could get something on the calendar in the not-so-distant future
* we could probably streamline this, but this also requires additional idleness, and concurrent idleness at that!

m.new_content.body: we could probably streamline this, but this also requires additional idleness, and concurrent idleness at that!

content.body: In the ideal case, we’d be able to invite a bot to co-own the meeting, get the email, download, upload, check in with us whether it needs to be held back for redaction, call it done. But, that sounds like writing software and is probably hard.
